text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Biko. Whatcha call me out for?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Hishiama! Do you want to be an ally to justice?!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Courage! Empathy! Hot-blooded passion! You've
got all the traits needed to be a hero!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha. I know all about your dream of becoming a
warrior of justice...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But that's not really in the cards for an
Umamusume like—

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, Hishiama, look over there! There's a bunch
of bad guys going after a good Umamusume over
there!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
They're what?! Not while I'm still breathin'! Stop,
in the name of the law!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, that was perfect! You really are a warrior of justice!
